content.body:
Implements a JSON-RPC 2.0 stdio MCP server so any MCP-aware runtime
(Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, …) can read/write MOM memories without
adapter code.

- cli/internal/mcp/server.go  — Server struct, Serve loop, JSON-RPC dispatch
- cli/internal/mcp/tools.go   — 5 tools: search_memories, get_memory, list_scopes, create_memory_draft, list_landmarks
- cli/internal/mcp/resources.go — 3 resources: mom://identity, mom://constraints, mom://scopes
- cli/internal/mcp/abac.go    — Authorizer interface + LocalAuthorizer stub for future ABAC
- cli/internal/mcp/server_test.go — 13 TDD tests covering all handlers
- cli/internal/cmd/serve.go   — `leo serve mcp` command + `leo serve status` subcommand
- cli/internal/cmd/root.go    — register serveCmd

Each tool call emits a ConsumptionEvent via transponder.
stdout reserved for JSON-RPC; all human-readable output to stderr.
File log written to .leo/logs/mcp-server.log in append mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(mcp): add MCP stdio server (#81)
